window_summary: This window tracks the recent FuelLabs/fuels-rs release stream from v0.62.0 through v0.77.0, covering feature additions, breaking changes, dependency bumps, and bug fixes across multiple minor and patch versions.

chunks.title: v0.62.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: FuelLabs/fuels-rs
Release: v0.62.0
Tag: v0.62.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-05-16T21:45:30Z; created_at: 2024-05-16T21:36:30Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* bug: fix revert id by @segfault-magnet in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1368
* chore: update `wallet.rs` in-line BIP doc by @K1-R1 in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1370
* refactor: move e2e tests into separate crate by @segfault-magnet in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1374
* chore: bump `forc` to `0.58.0` by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1379
* chore: export `Hasher` through `fuels::crypto` by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1377
* feat: use `fuel-abi-types` `0.5.0` by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1381
* chore: bump versions to v0.62.0 by @segfault-magnet in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1383
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/compare/v0.61.0...v0.62.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the FuelLabs/fuels-rs release v0.62.0, the project includes a bug fix for revert id, updates the in-line BIP documentation in wallet.rs, moves end-to-end tests into a separate crate, bumps forc to 0.58.0, exports Hasher through fuels::crypto, and adopts fuel-abi-types 0.5.0.

chunks.title: v0.63.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: FuelLabs/fuels-rs
Release: v0.63.0
Tag: v0.63.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-05-31T16:21:58Z; created_at: 2024-05-31T16:21:10Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* chore: update forc to 0.59.0 by @segfault-magnet in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1386
* fix(docs): replace version variables with hardcoded verisons by @Br1ght0ne in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1301
* Use dynamic supported fuel-core version by @Br1ght0ne in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1190
* chore: bump `forc` to `0.60.0` by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1388
* feat: use doc strings from the `abi` in `abigen` by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1390
* refactor: remove `provider` from `ScriptCallHandler` by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1391
* feat: make `setup_program_test!` macro hygienic by @Br1ght0ne in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1389
* Support `Upload` and `Upgrade` transactions by @xgreenx in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1382
* chore: bump `fuel-core` to `0.27.0` by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1395
* bug: e2e build script by @segfault-magnet in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1398
* bug: await tx committal by @segfault-magnet in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1400
* Bump versions to 0.63.0 by @digorithm in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1401
* bug: fix cargo publish by @segfault-magnet in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1403
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/compare/v0.62.0...v0.63.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the FuelLabs/fuels-rs release v0.63.0, the project updates forc to 0.59.0 and then to 0.60.0, replaces version variables with hardcoded versions in docs, uses dynamic supported fuel-core version, uses doc strings from the ABI in abigen, removes provider from ScriptCallHandler, makes setup_program_test! macro hygienic, adds support for Upload and Upgrade transactions, bumps fuel-core to 0.27.0, fixes e2e build script and transaction committal awaiting, and fixes cargo publish.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the FuelLabs/fuels-rs release v0.63.1, the project fixes documentation, adds a SetOptions { profile } command to macros, fixes fuel specification links, adds predicate estimation fallback to API in the provider, and welcomes a new contributor Azleal.

chunks.title: v0.64.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: FuelLabs/fuels-rs
Release: v0.64.0
Tag: v0.64.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-06-15T04:04:12Z; created_at: 2024-06-15T04:03:11Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* chore: use `fuel-core` `0.28.0` by @xgreenx in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1420
* feat!: var output estimation optimization (#1393) by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1418
* fix!: `dry_run` tx with non-zero base asset and tip by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1422
* fix: ensure policies are respected by @MujkicA in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1423
* fix!: filter already used inputs when adjusting for fee by @MujkicA in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1425
* fix: include witness data in estimation by @MujkicA in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1426
* fix: use fallback predicate estimation within transaction builder by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1428
* fix: estimate predicates during max fee estimation by @MujkicA in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1434
* chore: bump versions to `0.64.0` by @digorithm in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1433
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/compare/v0.63.1...v0.64.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the FuelLabs/fuels-rs release v0.64.0, the project uses fuel-core 0.28.0, introduces var output estimation optimization, fixes dry_run transactions with non-zero base asset and tip, ensures policies are respected, filters already used inputs when adjusting for fee, includes witness data in estimation, uses fallback predicate estimation within transaction builder, and estimates predicates during max fee estimation.

chunks.title: v0.65.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: FuelLabs/fuels-rs
Release: v0.65.0
Tag: v0.65.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-07-09T21:56:15Z; created_at: 2024-07-09T21:55:38Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* chore: use `fuel-core` `0.30.0` by @xgreenx in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1436
* feat: use fallback predicate estimation in `set_max_fee_policy` by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1435
* refactor!: unify call handlers to `CallHandler` by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1402
* chore: add editorconfig for TOML by @Br1ght0ne in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1421
* feat!: support static gas price setting in `NodeConfig` by @MujkicA in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1396
* chore: use fuel publish action by @MujkicA in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1450
* chore: update code owners by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1451
* docs: fix testnet and faucet link by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1452
* feat: finalize support for `raw_slice` and `string_slice` by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1448
* chore: use `forc` `0.61.2` by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1453
* chore: use `fuel-core` `0.31.0` by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1454
* chore: bump versions to 0.65.0 by @digorithm in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1456
## Breaking changes
- `FuelCallResponse` renamed to `CallResponse`
- `ContractCallHandler` removed in favour of `CallHandler`
- `ScriptCallHandler` removed in favour of `CallHandler`
- `method_hash` removed in favour of `CallHandler::new_contract_call`
- We've added the field `static_gas_price` to `NodeConfig`
- The `static_gas_price` for test providers is set to `1` which means that the user will have to have enough base asset to pay for transactions. The user can set the `static_gas_price` to `0` manually and start a provider with the specific `NodeConfig`
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/compare/v0.64.0...v0.65.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the FuelLabs/fuels-rs release v0.65.0, the project uses fuel-core 0.30.0 and later 0.31.0, uses fallback predicate estimation in set_max_fee_policy, unifies call handlers to CallHandler, adds editorconfig for TOML, supports static gas price setting in NodeConfig, uses fuel publish action, updates code owners, fixes testnet and faucet links, finalizes support for raw_slice and string_slice, uses forc 0.61.2, and introduces breaking changes: FuelCallResponse renamed to CallResponse, ContractCallHandler and ScriptCallHandler removed in favor of CallHandler, method_hash removed, static_gas_price field added to NodeConfig with default 1 for test providers.

chunks.title: v0.66.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: FuelLabs/fuels-rs
Release: v0.66.0
Tag: v0.66.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-08-09T23:30:34Z; created_at: 2024-08-09T23:29:30Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* chore: update `forc build` path in docs by @danielbate in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1459
* feat!: unfunded read only calls by @segfault-magnet in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1412
* bug!: accounts now cover max fee increase due to tolerance by @segfault-magnet in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1464
* chore: use `forc` `0.62.0` by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1466
* docs: Fix callParams broken link by @calldelegation in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1461
* chore: bump rust to 1.79.0 by @Br1ght0ne in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1467
* ci: bump (and pin) rust-cache action to v2.7.3 by @Br1ght0ne in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1468
* feat!: implement abi spec changes by @esdrubal in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1465
* feat!: account impersonation by @MujkicA in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1473
* feat: remove legacy code for abi without callpaths by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1474
* chore: enable testnet connection test by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1476
* feat!: deploying large contracts (loader + blob support) by @segfault-magnet in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1472
* chore: bump versions to 0.66.0 by @digorithm in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1478
## Breaking changes
* `SizedAsciiString` no longer implements `AsRef<[u8]>`. To get the underlying bytes, you can turn it into a `&str` via the new `AsRef<str>` and call `as_bytes()` on the `&str`: `sized_string.as_ref().as_bytes()`.
* `build_without_signatures` is now achieved by setting the build strategy to `BuildStrategy::NoSignatures` on the transaction builder before calling `build`.
* `.simulate()` now accepts an `Execution` argument, allowing for realistic or state-read-only simulations.
* `fee_checked_from_tx` is removed from all transaction builders. The max fee can now be estimated using the new method `estimate_max_fee`, which considers the maximum fee estimation tolerance set on the builders.
* The SDK previously performed transaction validity checks, including signature verification, before sending a transaction to the network. This was problematic since the checks also included signature verification, even when UTXO validation was turned off. To enable this feature and prevent future issues like failed validation checks due to version mismatches between the network and the SDK's upstream dependencies, we decided to remove the check. Since the SDK already abstracts building transactions for common cases (contract calls, transfers, etc.), validity issues are unlikely.
* `Contract::new` is removed and replaced with `Contract::regular`.
* `Contract` now accepts a generic argument denoting the type of contract (regular, loader, etc.)
## New Contributors
* @danielbate made their first contribution in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1459
* @calldelegation made their first contribution in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1461
* @esdrubal made their first contribution in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1465
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/compare/v0.65.1...v0.66.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the FuelLabs/fuels-rs release v0.66.0, the project updates forc build path in docs, introduces unfunded read only calls, accounts now cover max fee increase due to tolerance, uses forc 0.62.0, fixes callParams broken link, bumps Rust to 1.79.0, pins rust-cache action, implements ABI spec changes, adds account impersonation, removes legacy code for ABI without callpaths, enables testnet connection test, adds deploying large contracts with loader and blob support, and introduces breaking changes: SizedAsciiString no longer implements AsRef<[u8]>, build_without_signatures replaced by BuildStrategy::NoSignatures, .simulate() accepts Execution argument, fee_checked_from_tx removed and replaced by estimate_max_fee, SDK no longer performs pre-send transaction validity checks, Contract::new removed and replaced with Contract::regular, Contract now accepts a generic argument for contract type.

chunks.title: v0.66.7
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: FuelLabs/fuels-rs
Release: v0.66.7
Tag: v0.66.7; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-10-06T12:43:40Z; created_at: 2024-10-06T12:41:55Z
Release notes:
# Summary
In this release, we:
Loader and Regular executables now offer insight into the data section offset within.
Configurables can be shifted by a i64 offset.
Default estimation horizon bumped from 1 to 5.
# Features
- [#1522](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1522) - expose loader data offset + bump default gas horizon, by @segfault-magnet
# Chores
- [#1523](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1523) - version bump, by @segfault-magnet
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the FuelLabs/fuels-rs release v0.66.7, the project exposes loader data offset, allows configurables to be shifted by an i64 offset, and bumps the default estimation horizon from 1 to 5.

chunks.title: v0.66.9

Repository: FuelLabs/fuels-rs
Release: v0.66.9

chunks.title: v0.70.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: FuelLabs/fuels-rs
Release: v0.70.0
Tag: v0.70.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-01-17T02:18:06Z; created_at: 2025-01-17T02:17:10Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* chore: update forc to `0.66.4` by @MujkicA in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1539
* bug: read cargo toml instead of running cargo metadata by @segfault-magnet in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1552
* feat: check if coin already in cache by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1549
* feat: add `assert_ne` and `revert_with_log` revert signals by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1548
* feat: `extract_contract_call_data` function pub modifier by @zees-dev in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1553
* freeze gql version to 7.0.11 due to MSRV incompatibility of 7.0.12>= by @segfault-magnet in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1557
* `WalletUnlocked` function to expose `SecretKey` under `test-helpers` feature-flag by @zees-dev in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1554
* feat: script transaction human readable formatting by @segfault-magnet in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1542
* chore: propagate `test-helpers` feature flag to `fuels-accounts` from `fuels` by @segfault-magnet in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1560
* chore!: bump msrv to 1.81 by @segfault-magnet in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1568
* chore!: Move `get_asset_outputs_for_amount`, `get_asset_inputs_for_am… by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1567
* bug!: updating consensus parameters by @segfault-magnet in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1569
* chore: nits from previous PR by @segfault-magnet in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1570
* chore!: remove option return from predicate estimation by @segfault-magnet in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1571
* feat!: prevent implicit burn by @MujkicA in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1562
* feat!: gracefully handle unknown transaction variants  by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1499
* feat: use pagination in requests by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1572
* feat: use `blob_exists` endpoint before uploading contract blob by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1573
* feat!: streaming decoder by @Dentosal in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1564
* refactor: improve `calculate_required_asset_amounts` for contract calls by @hal3e in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1576
* chore: bump versions to v0.70.0 by @digorithm in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1582
## New Contributors
* @zees-dev made their first contribution in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1553
## Breaking changes
Notes are a WIP.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/compare/v0.66.10...v0.70.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the FuelLabs/fuels-rs release v0.70.0, the project updates forc to 0.66.4, fixes reading cargo toml instead of running cargo metadata, checks if coin already in cache, adds assert_ne and revert_with_log revert signals, makes extract_contract_call_data function public, freezes gql version to 7.0.11, exposes SecretKey under test-helpers feature-flag, adds script transaction human readable formatting, propagates test-helpers feature flag, bumps MSRV to 1.81, moves get_asset_outputs_for_amount and get_asset_inputs_for_amount, fixes updating consensus parameters, removes option return from predicate estimation, prevents implicit burn, gracefully handles unknown transaction variants, uses pagination in requests, uses blob_exists endpoint before uploading contract blob, adds streaming decoder, and improves calculate_required_asset_amounts for contract calls.

# Summary
In this release, we:

- added max fee estimation tolerance to `ScriptCallHandler`'s `convert_into_loader` to reduce the occurrence of invalid max fees.

chunks.title: v0.71.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: FuelLabs/fuels-rs
Release: v0.71.0
Tag: v0.71.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-03-13T16:10:45Z; created_at: 2025-03-13T16:03:31Z
Release notes:
# Summary
In this release, we:
- Added a fallback for querying balances when indexation is not supported
- Added max fee estimation tolerance to `ScriptCallHandler`'s `convert_into_loader` to reduce the occurrence of invalid max fees.
- Added support for AWS Key Management Service (KMS)
- Added support for Google Key Management Service (KMS)
- Added the `expiration` transaction policy. Now the user can limit until which block height the transaction is valid.
- Bumped minimum fuel core version to `0.41.7`
- Expose the tx status from succeeded translations in higher level APIs. The tx status holds the `total_gas` and `total_fee` used.
- Unified all the existing wallets in the SDK into a single wallet type holding a signer.
# Breaking
- Features
- [#1574](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1574) - use `total_gas` and `total_fee` from tx status, by @hal3e
- Chores
- [#1600](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1600) - bump `fuel-core-*` versions, by @segfault-magnet
- [#1620](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1620) - wallet refactoring, by @segfault-magnet
# Features
- [#1583](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1583) - add `expiration` transaction policy, by @hal3e
- [#1595](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1595) - add context to `Result`, by @hal3e
- [#1593](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1593) - switch blob ID calculation from data offset to configurable offset, by @Salka1988
- [#1602](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1602) - changelog generator for LTS releases, by @segfault-magnet
- [#1599](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1599) - add support for AWS KMS, by @Salka1988
- [#1607](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1607) - add `with_inputs` and `with_outputs` to contract `CallHandler`, by @hal3e
- [#1612](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1612) - add support for GOOGLE KMS, by @Salka1988
# Fixes
- [#1584](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1584) - bump `fuel-core` to `0.41.3` and fix test, by @hal3e
- [#1590](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1590) - script/predicate blob upload now uses the default max fee estimation tolerance, by @segfault-magnet
- [#1586](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1586) - message with data exluded in `adjust_for_fee`, by @hal3e
- [#1616](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1616) - fallback to single large request if no indexation available, by @segfault-magnet
# Chores
- [#1585](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1585) - bump `forc` to `0.66.6`, by @hal3e
- [#1596](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1596) - update `forc` to `0.66.7`, by @hal3e
- [#1601](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1601) - update sway's counter example, by @hal3e
- [#1605](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1605) - remove `script_needs_custom_decoder_logging` sway project, by @hal3e
- [#1621](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1621) - add set provider method, by @segfault-magnet
- [#1622](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1622) - bump `forc` to `0.66.10`, by @hal3e
- [#1624](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1624) - bump versions to `v0.71.0`, by @hal3e
# Migration Notes
### [1600 - Bump `fuel-core-*` versions](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1600)
Minimum `fuel-core-*` versions bumped to `0.41.7`
### [1620 - Wallet refactoring](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1620)
#### `ImpersonatedAccount` is removed
To achieve the same functionality instantiate a `FakeSigner:
```rust
let impersonator = Wallet::new(FakeSigner::new(address), provider.clone());
```
#### `AwsKmsSigner` and `GoogleKmsSigner` moved
under `fuels::accounts::signers::kms::aws` and `fuels::accounts::signers::kms::google`, respectfully.
#### `KmsWallet` removed
use an ordinary `Wallet` now with a kms signer (aws or...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the FuelLabs/fuels-rs release v0.71.0, the project adds a fallback for querying balances when indexation is not supported, adds max fee estimation tolerance to ScriptCallHandler's convert_into_loader, adds support for AWS KMS and Google KMS, adds the expiration transaction policy, bumps minimum fuel-core version to 0.41.7, exposes tx status from succeeded translations, unifies all existing wallets into a single wallet type holding a signer, uses total_gas and total_fee from tx status, bumps fuel-core-* versions, refactors wallets, adds context to Result, switches blob ID calculation from data offset to configurable offset, adds changelog generator for LTS releases, adds with_inputs and with_outputs to contract CallHandler, fixes script/predicate blob upload to use default max fee estimation tolerance, fixes message with data excluded in adjust_for_fee, and adds fallback to single large request if no indexation available.

chunks.title: v0.72.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: FuelLabs/fuels-rs
Release: v0.72.0
Tag: v0.72.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-04-23T22:26:58Z; created_at: 2025-04-23T22:17:42Z
Release notes:
# Summary
In this release, we:
- Added two need functions in the `Provider` to access preconfirmations `send_transaction_and_await_status` and `subscribe_transaction_status`
- Bumped `fuel-core` to `0.43.1`
- Added support for simulating calls at specific block height
# Breaking
- Chores
- [#1630](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1630) - bump `rust` to `1.85.0` and edition to `2024`, by @hal3e
- [#1652](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1652) - bump fuel core to 0 43 1, by @segfault-magnet
# Features
- [#1628](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1628) - bump `fuel-core` to `0.42.0`, by @hal3e
- [#1644](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1644) - add support for preconfirmations, by @AurelienFT
# Chores
- [#1626](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1626) - bump `forc` to `0.67.0`, by @hal3e
- [#1635](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1635) - update codeowners, by @hal3e
- [#1636](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1636) - fix flaky `coin caching` test, by @hal3e
- [#1638](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1638) - update public key recovery example in docs, by @bitzoic
- [#1640](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1640) - bump `fuel-core` to `v0.43.0`, by @hal3e
- [#1606](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1606) - return error when adjusting for fee, by @hal3e
- [#1646](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1646) - fix some remaining todos regarding transaction fees, by @hal3e
- [#1654](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1654) - bump `forc` to `0.68.0`, by @hal3e
- [#1653](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1653) - bump versions, by @segfault-magnet
# Migration Notes
### [1630 - Bump `rust` to `1.85.0` and edition to `2024`](https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1630)
- bumped `rust` version to `1.85.0`  and edition to `2024`
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the FuelLabs/fuels-rs release v0.72.0, the project adds send_transaction_and_await_status and subscribe_transaction_status functions in the Provider to access preconfirmations, bumps fuel-core to 0.43.1, adds support for simulating calls at specific block height, bumps Rust to 1.85.0 and edition to 2024, bumps fuel-core to 0.42.0, adds support for preconfirmations, bumps forc to 0.67.0, updates codeowners, fixes flaky coin caching test, updates public key recovery example in docs, bumps fuel-core to v0.43.0, returns error when adjusting for fee, fixes some remaining todos regarding transaction fees, and bumps forc to 0.68.0.

chunks.title: v0.76.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: FuelLabs/fuels-rs
Release: v0.76.0
Tag: v0.76.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-10-20T11:12:27Z; created_at: 2025-10-20T11:06:07Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* chore: remove patch branch from e2e `Cargo.toml` by @ironcev in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1693
* Bump rust to 1.90 by @zees-dev in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1694
* chore(deps): bump fuel-core and fuel-vm deps, add owner TxPolicy by @rymnc in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1697
* chore(version): bump version to 0.76.0 and make test clearer by @rymnc in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1698
## New transaction policy "Owner"
This allows you to set the owner of the transaction as described in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuel-specs/pull/618
## Breaking changes
1.  Receipts in `Failure` and `Success` states of transactions are now wrapped in an `Arc`
2. `TxStatus::take_receipts_checked` and `TxStatus::take_receipts` now return `Arc<Vec<Receipt>>`
3. `ReceiptParser::extract_contract_call_data` and `ReceiptParser::extract_script_data` now return `Option<Bytes>`, where `Bytes` is an optimized type from `fuel-types` v0.65.0
## New Contributors
* @ironcev made their first contribution in https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/pull/1693
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FuelLabs/fuels-rs/compare/v0.75.1...v0.76.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the FuelLabs/fuels-rs release v0.76.0, the project removes a patch branch from e2e Cargo.toml, bumps Rust to 1.90, bumps fuel-core and fuel-vm deps, adds owner TxPolicy, wraps receipts in Failure and Success states in an Arc, changes TxStatus::take_receipts_checked and TxStatus::take_receipts to return Arc<Vec<Receipt>>, and changes ReceiptParser::extract_contract_call_data and extract_script_data to return Option<Bytes>.

questions.query_text: In the FuelLabs/fuels-rs releases, which release introduces support for Upload and Upgrade transactions?

answer_support.answer_text: adds support for Upload and Upgrade transactions

questions.query_text: Across the FuelLabs/fuels-rs releases, how does the handling of max fee estimation differ between v0.65.1 and v0.66.0?

options.text: v0.65.1 adds max fee estimation tolerance, while v0.66.0 removes fee_checked_from_tx and introduces estimate_max_fee with tolerance consideration.
v0.65.1 removes max fee estimation, while v0.66.0 adds it back.
Both releases only update fuel-core without changing fee estimation.
v0.65.1 introduces estimate_max_fee, while v0.66.0 removes it.

questions.expected_answer: v0.65.1 adds max fee estimation tolerance, while v0.66.0 removes fee_checked_from_tx and introduces estimate_max_fee with tolerance consideration.

answer_support.answer_text: fee_checked_from_tx is removed from all transaction builders. The max fee can now be estimated using the new method estimate_max_fee, which considers the maximum fee estimation tolerance set on the builders.

questions.query_text: In the FuelLabs/fuels-rs release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds support for AWS KMS and Google KMS, (2) a release that adds support for preconfirmations via send_transaction_and_await_status and subscribe_transaction_status, (3) a release that adds support for the new ABI errors and renames LogFormatter constructors.

answer_support.answer_text: adds support for AWS KMS and Google KMS
adds send_transaction_and_await_status and subscribe_transaction_status functions in the Provider to access preconfirmations
adds support for the new ABI errors, renames LogFormatter constructors to new_log and new_error
